equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Higher breakevens imply more inflation pressure.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-20 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.41
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-08-20: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.41/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-20, the score printed 16.41/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and equity stress doing most of the work.
